angles: Maia vs AI Agents: Make has two distinct AI systems — Maia builds scenarios in natural language while AI Agents execute autonomously. Most competitors confuse or conflate the two.
The Reasoning Panel differentiator: Make is the only major no-code platform that shows you exactly how an agent thinks step-by-step making it ideal for regulated industries and enterprise use.
Visual canvas plus AI equals trust and transparency: Unlike Zapier Agents or n8n Make shows every agent decision on the same canvas as the automation.
Multimodal agents in no-code: Make AI Agents can ingest and produce PDFs images CSVs without code. This is new in 2026 and almost uncovered by competitors.
Library of Agents as a speed-to-value story: Make ships ready-made agent templates for inventory research triage and reporting. Beginners can launch in minutes.
Cost angle: Make operation-based pricing means AI agent runs are cheaper at scale than Zapier per-task model for multi-step workflows.
Maia for team onboarding: Natural-language scenario generation lowers the floor for non-technical team members who need to build or modify automations.
